practice.task: Find all employees who earn more than 55000.
practice.title: High Earners
practice.code:
-- TODO: Write a SELECT with WHERE
-- Table: employees (id, name, salary, department)

solutionCode: SELECT name, salary FROM employees WHERE salary > 55000;
meta:
TITLE: High Earners
TASK: Find all employees who earn more than 55000.
EXPECTED_OUTPUT: Bob|60000
HINT: Use WHERE clause with > operator.
